name: Turkey Chili Egg Skillet Wrap
purpose: Savory breakfast wrap using turkey chili mince.

ingredients.item: Instant Pro Smoky Turkey Chili Mince

instructions: Heat turkey chili mince in a pan for 2-3 minutes.
Add eggs directly and scramble into the turkey or make small wells and set eggs softly.
Cook 3-5 minutes until eggs are set.
Fill lavash/pita and toast 1-2 minutes if desired.
storage: Cook fresh using prepared turkey base.
reheating: Not ideal after eggs are added.
substitutions: Chicken base can replace turkey, but use Garlic Yogurt Sauce.
meal_prep_notes: Only turkey base is prepped; eggs are fresh.
why_it_fits_weekly_plan: Satisfying non-sweet breakfast from one turkey base.
